notes: Seed version derived from the 18-report tensor-priority deep-research batch (aporia/docs/deep_research_batch_tensor_priority_2026-05-09/) and its synthesis (aporia/docs/tensor_priority_synthesis_2026-05-09.md). This is the first formalization of the 5-layer substrate vocabulary (Primitives / Attacks / Patterns / Anti-anchors / Composition rules). Schema is FROZEN outside of an explicit contract-change window; future batches will propose additions via TODO entries flagged in this directory. See README.md for scope, non-goals, and the windowed-amendment protocol.
